channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two Arrested in R800k Sedfa Corruption and Kickback Investigation
item.description: Two individuals, a company director and a financial adviser, were arrested in connection with a corruption and fraud case involving over R800,000 in kickbacks from the Small Enterprise Development and...

item.title: Recognising The Contributions and Achievements of Women Globally and in Nigeria
item.description: Dis article dey hail di efforts and achievements of women for all over di world, with special focus on Nigeria and Rivers State. E talk how women dey contribute for family, community, work, business, ...

item.title: Kyle Sandilands to Contest Termination of ARN Radio Contract Under Fair Work Act
item.description: Radio host Kyle Sandilands has had his $100 million contract with ARN terminated following controversy surrounding his morning show with co-host Jackie 'O' Henderson. The termination came after weeks ...

item.title: US Officials Press for Leadership Change in Cuba Amid Nationwide Power Crisis
item.description: On March 17, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump and Secretary of State Marco Rubio signalled stronger actions towards Cuba, following a nationwide blackout caused in part by recent U.S. sanctions on Ve...

item.title: Thailand’s Gawdland Claims Victory in ‘UK vs the World’ Season 3, Ending UK’s Reign
item.description: Thailand’s Gawdland has made history by winning Season 3 of 'RuPaul's Drag Race: UK vs the World,' putting an end to the United Kingdom’s consecutive winning streak in the competition. This season bro...

item.title: Former Tanzania Spy Chief Reflects on Magufuli’s Legacy of Dedication and Leadership
item.description: At the five-year memorial service held in Chato, former Tanzania Intelligence and Security Service (TISS) director Dr Modestus Kipilimba remembered late President John Pombe Magufuli as a leader whose...

item.title: US Offers Voluntary Departure Program with Travel and Financial Assistance for Illegal Immigrants
item.description: The United States Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has introduced a voluntary self-deportation scheme called Project Homecoming, which provides free flights and an exit bonus of USD 2,600 for ill...

item.title: Comelec clears Marcoleta of election offense; investigates campaign donors for late reporting
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially ruled that Senator Rodante Marcoleta did not commit any violation in relation to his campaign contribution disclosures. The en banc adopted the rec...

item.title: Taiwanese Indigenous Dance Performance Restored Before Women's Asian Cup Quarter Final Against China
item.description: A Taiwanese Indigenous dance group was nearly prevented from performing before Taiwan's Women's Asian Cup quarter final against China, but the performance went ahead after intervention from Taiwanese ...

item.title: Nigel Farage’s Paid Cameo Videos Spark Controversy Over Extremist Endorsements
item.description: Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, has been using the celebrity video platform Cameo to send personalised messages for payment, reportedly earning at least £374,893 over five years. An investigation o...

item.title: Overview of Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill, 2026 and its Implications
item.description: Maharashtra’s Freedom of Religion Bill, 2026 has triggered significant political and legal debate across the state. The legislation aims to prevent forced religious conversions by introducing strict p...

item.title: Behind the Scenes of Cirque du Soleil’s Luzia: Performer Life and Training
item.description: Cirque Life, a five-part docuseries, provides a behind-the-scenes look at Cirque du Soleil’s show Luzia, debuting on March 19 on CBC and CBC Gem. The series focuses on the intricate preparation, train...

item.title: MMDA launches free ride program ahead of March 19 transport strike
item.description: The Metropolitan Manila Development Authority (MMDA) is set to provide free rides for commuters in anticipation of a scheduled transport strike on March 19, 2026. MMDA General Manager Nicholas Torre I...

item.title: Zanzibar Tourism Shows Growth Despite Seasonal Dip in February
item.description: Zanzibar’s tourism sector showed some resilience in February 2026 with international arrivals going up by 4.9 percent compared to same month last year. The Office of the Chief Government Statistician ...

item.title: Cardinal Advincula Declares St. Therese of the Child Jesus Parish in Antipolo as National Shrine
item.description: On March 17, 2026, Manila Cardinal Jose Advincula led a special Mass at the St. Therese of the Child Jesus Parish in Antipolo City, Rizal, formally declaring it as a national shrine. This elevation re...

item.title: MQM-P urges PM to reconsider Kamran Tessori’s removal as Sindh governor

item.title: El-Rufai Files Court Case Claiming ICPC Tried to Stop His Political Participation
item.description: Nasir El-Rufai, wey be former governor of Kaduna State, don file one 30-page criminal complaint for court, accuse the Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) say dem...

item.title: Exploring the Phenomenon of ‘Alpine Divorce’ on Hiking Trips
item.description: A growing number of women have shared experiences of being left behind by male partners during hikes, a phenomenon now dubbed 'alpine divorce' on social media. These incidents often occur when men wal...

item.title: Trump encounters political deadlock on potential conflict with Iran
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump is reportedly facing a political and diplomatic impasse regarding potential military action against Iran. The situation has become complicated as international and dom...

item.title: Chris Pratt Shares His Young Children Have Not Seen His Movies Due to Screen-Free Parenting
item.description: Chris Pratt, known for starring in multiple blockbuster franchises including Marvel films, Jurassic Park sequels, and Lego movies, revealed that his youngest children have never watched any movies. Sp...
